coordinateSystem.cellPolygonFormula: logical square [x±0.5,y±0.5] projected through the same affine basis

parityRule.neighborInvariant: orthogonal logical neighbours always have different parity

visualEvidence.note: Visible brightness is a cross-check only; logical parity is coordinate-derived.
